title: runc CVE-2024-21626
description:
In runc 1.1.11 and earlier, an internal file descriptor leak could cause a newly-spawned container process (from runc exec) to have a working directory in the host filesystem namespace. This could lead to a container escape by giving access to the host filesystem.
[GHSA-xr7r-f8xq-vfvv](https://github.com/opencontainers/runc/security/advisories/GHSA-xr7r-f8xq-vfvv)
